subcodes.first_line: The printed letters of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, which thou hadst published in thine own graceful handwriting, have arrived... The beloved of God remain unaware, while the followers of Yahyá, night and day, spread corruption, attributing to every faction they meet the Bahá'ís' allegiance to another [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه های مطبوعه عبدالبهاء که بخط خوش خویش طبع نموده بودید رسید ... احبّآء الهی غافل و یحیائیها شب و روز در فساد بهر حزبی که برسند بهائیان را بحزبی دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @non-participation in politics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @review of publications
